WWUS20 KWNS 271449

SPC WW 271449
NEZ000-271600-

URGENT - IMMEDIATE BROADCAST REQUESTED
TEST...Severe Thunderstorm Watch Number 9999...TEST
NWS Storm Prediction Center Norman OK
850 AM CST Mon Jan 27 2020

The NWS Storm Prediction Center has issued a...TEST...
 
* Severe Thunderstorm Watch for portions of 
  Northeast Nebraska

* Effective this Monday morning from 850 AM until 1000 AM CST.

* Primary threats include...

SUMMARY...This is a test watch. Please disregard.

THE TEST SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WATCH AREA IS APPROXIMATELY ALONG
and 35 STATUTE MILES NORTH and SOUTH OF A LINE from 15 MILES WEST
SOUTHWEST OF NORFOLK NEBRASKA TO 55 MILES EAST NORTHEAST OF
COLUMBUS NEBRASKA.  FOR A COMPLETE DEPICTION OF THE WATCH SEE THE
ASSOCIATED WATCH OUTLINE UPDATE (WOUS64 KWNS WOU9).

PRECAUTIONARY/PREPAREDNESS ACTIONS...

REMEMBER...A Severe Thunderstorm Watch means conditions are
favorable for severe thunderstorms in and close to the watch area.
Persons in these areas should be on the lookout for threatening
weather conditions and listen for later statements and possible
warnings. Severe thunderstorms can and occasionally do produce
tornadoes.

&&

AVIATION...A few severe thunderstorms with hail surface and aloft to
0.5 inches. Extreme turbulence and surface wind gusts to 50 knots. A
few cumulonimbi with maximum tops to 500. Mean storm motion vector
24035.

...Spc
